subcodes.first_line: O thou who composeth prose and poetry! Well done indeed, for thou hast drawn forth the most subtle of meanings and fashioned them into verses like unto pearls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الناظم الناثر لله درک من اقتباس ادق المعانی و تنظیمه اشعارا کالدرر
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
